title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 335 allows manufacturers to contact boat owners in case of a safety recall.",
    "The California Consumer Privacy Act provides some of the highest privacy protections in the US.",
    "AB 335 extends 2019 exemptions for road vehicles to watercraft and boat dealers.",
    "California is the third largest boating state in the US.",
    "Californians purchased $718 million in new boats, engines, and trailers in 2018.",
    "The legislation ensures that consumers receive important and timely safety recall information.",
    "The bill aims to help consumers confirm warranty eligibility easily."
  ]
}
```
